title: phleum pratense subsp. roshevitzii
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. roshevitzii, also known as a subspecies of timothy grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. roshevitzii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as extracts and infusions, are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
